name: Dupe Frog
desc: This card's name becomes "Des Frog" while on the field. Monsters your opponent controls cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Frog" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Dupe Frog".
mnst_eff: This card's name becomes "Des Frog" while on the field. Monsters your opponent controls cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Frog" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Dupe Frog".
eff: This card's name becomes "Des Frog" while on the field. Monsters your opponent controls cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Frog" monster from your Deck or GY to your hand, except "Dupe Frog".

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
